Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik
Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik
Matt Lanter and Jason Tartik

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Video.summary: The Indianapolis Drivers take on the Princeton Bruisers in a women's match.
Video.title: NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

Image.alt: NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)
NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)
NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 returns to the Jio World Garden in Mumbai for an electrifying Tie 8 showdown. The defending champions, Bengaluru Jawans—led by coach Oliver Strecker and backed by owners Atlee and Priya—return to the court for the first time since their dominant opening night performance. They face a determined Delhi Dilwale squad, coached by Wesley Gabrielsson, who are looking to climb the standings after a hard-fought tie-break victory in their previous outing.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Delhi - Day 4 Tie 2

Video.summary: Pei-chuan Kao and Mari Humberg face off in the US Open Pickleball Championship's Women's Pro Singles backdraw quarterfinals.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals

Video.summary: Rick Witsken and John Sperling take on David Furman and Stefan Andren in this Men's Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu take on Patrick Cote and Susannah Barr in this Mixed Pro Split Age Quarterfinal.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: NCPA Round of 32: San Diego State University vs. Utah Tech University
Video.title: NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Round of 32: SDSU vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere of the second "South Indian derby" in World Pickleball League Season 2 as the undefeated table-toppers, Chennai Super Champs, face off against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The drama unfolds at Mumbai's Jio World Garden with high-velocity matches, including a premier showdown between unbeaten singles stars Rika Fujiwara and Shawn Mendes. Every rally is a tactical masterclass, featuring the "beast from the East" Lee Hwang Nam in a high-stakes mixed doubles battle against Caitlin Hart and Louis Laville. From "sensational lobs" to the strategic intensity of men's singles, this tie showcases the pinnacle of professional pickleball as both teams fight for dominance on the leaderboard.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Hyderabad - Day 9 Tie 2

Video.summary: The high-voltage group stage of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) nears its end on Day 8 with a crucial matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Chennai - Day 8 Tie 1

Video.summary: The stakes reach a boiling point at Mumbai's Jio World Garden as the league-leading Chennai Super Champs face off against the defending champions, the Bengaluru Jawans, in a critical top-of-the-table clash. Witness a masterclass in professional grit as "dominating" stars like Katrina Stewart and tactical veterans like Dusty Boyer battle for supremacy on the road to the semi-finals. From high-velocity "scary" 15-minute singles sprints to intense mixed doubles rallies, every point contributes to the prestigious Band of Honor leaderboard. Experience the strategic drama of game-changing "Pickle Plays" and high-stakes challenges in a tie where one momentum shift could decide who walks away with the top spot in the league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the exciting Women's Doubles Open 4.5+ Final from the 2023 English Open held at Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. This match features dynamic teams: Megan Fudge and Susannah Barr face off against Lee Whitwell and Riley Bohnert in a highly competitive final. Follow expert commentary highlighting key plays including Susannah Barr’s precise lobs, Megan Fudge’s powerful forehand, and strategic teamwork. See how the match unfolds in a best-of-three games format with a hard stop on time. This showcase of top-level English pickleball captures the skill, tactics, and intensity of the sport. Stay tuned for post-match insights and upcoming mixed doubles action.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Video.summary: In this gripping quarterfinal from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, Helen Wilhelm and Anna Shirley face Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn in a thrilling three-game battle. Featuring powerful strokes, smart resets, and tactical momentum shifts, this senior pro women’s doubles match highlights both experience and finesse. Watch as the teams adapt and clash in a showcase of skill and strategy at the highest level.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Wilhelm & Shirley vs LeBlang & Tarn

Video.summary: Megan Fudge along with husband Ryler Deheart faced off against Simone Jardim & Kyle Yates in a Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: Beth Bellamy & Yates Johnson compete with Megan Fudge & Paul Olin in a Bronze medal match
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Bronze Medal

Video.summary: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: This episode of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, features a redemption match between the Sarasota Manatees and the Lakeland Palms. Both teams are coming off a loss and are looking for a win in this intense doubles matchup. The Manatees jump out to an early lead, but the Palms, with strong play from players like Ava and Ashley Griffith, manage to crawl back into the game and make it a nail-biting finish. The episode features courtside commentary from Jay Carroll and Hugh Greene.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms

NPL - Stingers vs Hammers Team (Mixed)

Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)

Video.summary: Tennis professional Kevin Anderson teams up with pickleball pro Megan Fudge to face off against former LPGA professional Sherri Steinhauer and teammate Pickleball pro Cierra Gaytan-Leach.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 1

Video.summary: Watch as Pickleball Pros Dan Granot and Phillip Phillips, paired with NFL legend Brandon Siler and Pickleball professional Ryan Sherry, battle it out in this thrilling Men's Doubles match from the Picklebowl 2022. Filmed in the stunning Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event brings together celebrities and professional athletes representing their alma maters. The game is not only about competition but also raising funds for a great cause, benefiting Desire Street Ministries. With star power from both the sports and entertainment worlds, this exciting match is filled with hard-hitting shots, strategic play, and thrilling moments that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Video.summary: Filmed at the US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, this Pro Women’s Doubles matchup features the powerhouse mother-daughter team Leigh and Anna Leigh Waters, known for their aggressive tactics and flawless communication. They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 – Pro Women’s Doubles – Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Video.summary: Welcome back to the mixed pro doubles semifinal from Naples, Florida. This intense match features the teams of Rianna Livornese and Riley Bohnert against Marty Dancuart and Cody Braverman. The match is a thrilling display of skill, including powerful drives and dinks. The broadcast highlights a "golden pickle" moment and the commentator, Gigi LeMaster, provides expert insight into the strategic play of both teams as they battle for a spot in the final.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Livornese/Bohnert vs. Dancurt/Braveman

Video.title: S01E03 - Peoria Pythons

Image.alt: S01E03 - Peoria Pythons
S01E03 - Peoria Pythons
S01E03 - Peoria Pythons

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Video.summary: November 16 - 18, 2023 at Palm Beach Gardens Tennis & Pickleball Center, all levels of players competed in the World Pickleball Open 2023!
Video.title: World Pickleball Open 2023

Image.alt: World Pickleball Open 2023
World Pickleball Open 2023
World Pickleball Open 2023
